record.field:
Your voice, our vision: come see how decisions are made.

Transparency is the cornerstone of our "Digital City Hall." We invite you to attend our monthly City Council Meeting in the Innovation Suite. This is where local policy is debated, budgets are reviewed, and the future of our parks, roads, and services is decided. While the tone is professional, the atmosphere is open—because these decisions affect your daily life.

  • Audience: Engaged residents, local business owners, and anyone curious about municipal governance.

  • Modalities: 

    • Location: City Hall Meeting Room (Second Floor) or join via the live stream link in your Citizen Portal.

    • Public Comment: The first 30 minutes are dedicated to "Floor Time" where residents can speak for 3 minutes on any agenda item.

  • The Details: The full agenda is available for download on the Citizen Portal 48 hours before the meeting. Come early to grab a coffee and meet your representatives informally before the session begins.

Democracy in action at the Horizon Hall

It’s time to choose the leaders who will guide our community for the next term. Our modern polling station in the Horizon Hall is designed to make voting a fast, accessible, and inspiring experience. Whether you prefer the tactile tradition of paper ballots or the efficiency of our new digital voting kiosks, we’ve ensured a secure and private environment for every resident to cast their vote.

  • Audience: All registered municipal voters. First-time voters are especially encouraged to attend!

  • Modalities: 

    • Requirements: Please bring a valid photo ID and your voter registration card (digital or physical).

    • Process: Check-in at the front desk, then choose your preferred voting method (private paper booth or digital kiosk).

  • Details: Polling is open from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM. High-visibility signage and "Civic Ambassadors" will be on-site to help guide you through the process. Let's make our turnout the highest yet!

A night of wonder for the whole community

Join us on the Civic Plaza for our most anticipated evening of the year! As the sun sets behind our modern City Hall, the sky will come alive with a spectacular choreographed firework display. It’s more than just a show; it’s a moment for neighbors to connect, families to celebrate, and for us to say "thank you" for being part of this vibrant community.

  • Audience: Open to everyone! Families, children, and residents of all ages.

  • Modalities:

    • Entry: Free of charge (please register via the "Get Tickets" button to help us manage capacity).

    • Arrival: The plaza opens at 7:00 PM for food and music; fireworks begin promptly at 9:30 PM.

  • Details: We’ll have local food trucks and live music on the terrace. Bring your own picnic blankets or lawn chairs. For the safety of all, please leave pets at home as the display can be loud.
